ddls:
CREATE TABLE "media_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the content */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the content */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the content was published */,
  "primary_image" TEXT /* URL of the primary image associated with the content */,
  "primary_image_caption" TEXT /* Caption for the primary image */,
  "primary_image_rights" TEXT /* Rights information for the primary image */,
  "subjects" TEXT /* Subjects or categories associated with the content */,
  "station" TEXT /* Media station that published the content */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the content was published */,
  "place" TEXT /* Place where the content was published */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords associated with the content */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the place where the content was published */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the place where the content was published */,
  "media_rss_url" TEXT /* URL of the MediaRSS feed for the content */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of media file (e.g., image, video, audio, article) */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the media file in bytes */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the media content in seconds */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the content */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_station FOREIGN KEY ("station") REFERENCES media_stations ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_media_content_subjects FOREIGN KEY ("subjects") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the media station */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the media station */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the media station */,
  "branding_assets" TEXT /* Branding assets (e.g., logos, color schemes) of the media station */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience demographics (e.g., age, location) for the media station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "parent_subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent subject for hierarchical subject relationships */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_producers" (
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each content producer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user associated with the content producer */,
  "producer_name" TEXT /* Name of the content producer */,
  "producer_email" TEXT /* Email address of the content producer */,
  "producer_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the content producer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_producers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version of the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_versions_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., content producer, editor, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the content */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the content was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content associated with the keyword */,
  "keyword" TEXT /* Keyword term */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_keywords_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject associated with the content */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content associated with the subject */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id", "content_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_producer_roles" (
  "producer_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each producer role */,
  "producer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content producer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the content producer (e.g., author, editor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("producer_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_producer_roles_producer_id FOREIGN KEY ("producer_id") REFERENCES content_producers ("producer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "content_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "content_id" INTEGER /* ID of the content being reported on */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_content_reports_content_id FOREIGN KEY ("content_id") REFERENCES media_content ("content_id")
)
